message:
chore: extend .gitignore for benchmark probe scratch artifacts and sqlite WAL files

- Add storage.sqlite3.* glob to catch SQLite WAL and shared-memory
  sidecar files (e.g. storage.sqlite3-wal, storage.sqlite3-shm) in
  addition to the existing storage.sqlite3-* pattern which only matches
  the hyphenated journal/wal variants.
- Add six new patterns under a "Local benchmark probe scratch artifacts"
  section to ignore ephemeral files generated by scripts/benchmark_record.sh
  during mount probe benchmarks:
  - baselines/hyperfine/*/mount_probe.ext4 (temporary ext4 images)
  - baselines/hyperfine/*/mount_recovery_probe.ext4 (journal-recovery images)
  - baselines/hyperfine/*/mount_probe_mounts/ (FUSE mount point directories)
  - baselines/hyperfine/*/ffs_cli_mount_probe.stderr (mount probe stderr)
  - baselines/hyperfine/*/ffs_cli_mount_recovery_probe.stderr (recovery stderr)
  - baselines/hyperfine/*/ffs_cli_inspect_probe.stderr (inspect probe stderr)
  These files are created and destroyed during each benchmark recording
  session and should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,15 @@ perf.data.*
 # Local scratch DBs
 storage.sqlite3
 storage.sqlite3-*
+storage.sqlite3.*
+
+# Local benchmark probe scratch artifacts (generated by scripts/benchmark_record.sh)
+baselines/hyperfine/*/mount_probe.ext4
+baselines/hyperfine/*/mount_recovery_probe.ext4
+baselines/hyperfine/*/mount_probe_mounts/
+baselines/hyperfine/*/ffs_cli_mount_probe.stderr
+baselines/hyperfine/*/ffs_cli_mount_recovery_probe.stderr
+baselines/hyperfine/*/ffs_cli_inspect_probe.stderr
 
 # FastEmbed model caches (downloaded at runtime)
 .fastembed_cache/
